name: Tokyo
key_planning_challenge: A mature megacity must rebalance aging neighborhoods, rail capacity, heat risk, and selective redevelopment around stations.
expansion_constraint: Bay edge, seismic risk, limited vacant land, protected river corridors

historical_snapshots.key_event: Post-war reconstruction and rapid metropolitan growth
Bubble-era redevelopment concentrates around major stations
Compact city and disaster preparedness planning expand
Station-area regeneration and heat resilience become priorities
